artPrompt: An ongoing-magic scene of a municipal tax window where coins and tumbling dice pour from a glowing arcane chute into a cold cyan collection slot, siphoning faint life-mist upward toward a stern stamp pressing down. Beige cabinets and ticket dispensers frame the relentless levy. The flow of coins climbs the wide landscape frame. Wide 4:3 landscape, oppressive bureaucratic stillness, faint arcane glow, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: The Recreational Gambling Tax
text: Whenever an opponent rolls one or more dice or flips one or more coins, that player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. (The house — and the tax office — always wins.)
flavorText: Down the hall, the Mayor's caucus is rolling dice all day. Prim simply opened a tab.
